TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tunisia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 34 00 N, 9 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 163,610 sq km (maki' tay 93ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 155,360 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 8,250 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 11,134,588. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 64.80% , lhlahuy hya' ga 6.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 28.60%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Tunis. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 20 na tay cyugal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Beji Caid Essebsi, aring ryax 31 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: tunis~…ēia ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a tunis~…ē. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ő≤eji ¶~ ®ai* es~…ēs~…ēeő≤s~…ēi, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Tunisia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 34 00 N, 9 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 163,610 sq km (maki' tay 93ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 155,360 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 8,250 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 11,134,588. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 64.80% , lhlahuy hya' ga 6.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 28.60%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Tunis. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 20 na tay cyugal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Beji Caid Essebsi, aring ryax 31 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: tunis~…ēia ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a tunis~…ē. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ő≤eji ¶~ ®ai* es~…ēs~…ēeő≤s~…ēi, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
